_comment: Authority config — single source of truth for what each profile can do. Profiles named here are what the runtime trusts; <slug>-agent/agent-role.md is just the system prompt. A profile dir without an entry here will not load.

env._comment: Map agent-facing env names to keys present in .env. The agent sees only what's listed here. Example: an Anthropic API key for tool use that should bill notes' allotment, not admin's.
